course.title: Smart Contracts for Agent Lotteries
course.tagline: Unbiasable draws, VDF verify, and escrow — lottery/ patterns in Python with Foundry vectors.

m1.title: Unbiasable lottery draw
m1.concept: Commit–reveal and ECVRF fix operator grinding attacks.

m2.title: VDF verify on-chain
m2.concept: Wesolowski proofs from Chronos match Foundry test vectors.

m3.title: Escrow & payment channels
m3.concept: Hold funds until delivery; receipt-gated debit like AIMarketEscrow.

m4.title: Relayer round lifecycle
m4.concept: baseSeed, Sortes draw, optional on-chain VDF path.

m5.title: Capstone: fair round
m5.concept: Simulate a full lottery round with verifiable artifacts.

site.quickstart_intro: Clone the repo, install deps, and run labs locally or in Colab.
site.certificate_intro: Complete all labs and exercises to unlock your certificate.
site.certificate_locked: Check off all labs and exercises to unlock
site.footer: Part of the AIMarket ecosystem — lottery/ on Base with Platon, Chronos, and Sortes oracles.

exercises.heading: Your turn
exercises.lab01_hint: Show fair draw verifies while biased lottery grinds. Check: python labs/run_exercises.py --module m1
exercises.lab02_hint: Verify the bundled Foundry vector. Check: python labs/run_exercises.py --module m2
exercises.lab03_hint: Debit twice with the same receipt — second must fail. Check: python labs/run_exercises.py --module m3
exercises.lab04_hint: Trace baseSeed → Sortes → VDF beacon. Check: python labs/run_exercises.py --module m4
exercises.lab05_hint: Run simulate_fair_round with onchain_vdf=True. Check: python labs/run_exercises.py --module m5

lab01_unbiasable_draw.hint: Compare biased grinding vs fair ECVRF draw.

lab03_escrow_channel.hint: Open, debit, and settle an escrow channel.

lab04_relayer_round.hint: Walk relayer round seed and draw phases.

lab05_lottery_capstone.hint: Capstone round with VRF + VDF artifacts.

lab01.docs_note: On-chain consumer: see lottery/docs/ and AIAgentLottery.sol.

lab02.foundry_note: Run forge test in lottery/contracts — ChronosVDF.t.sol uses the same vector.
